text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as Symboli Rudolf and I are making
our way through the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's happening over there?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You two over there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It looks like a raffle, Trainer. Shall we?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What, for me to be intrigued? It just so happens
that I have a ticket.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Brian gave it to me. I recall she said she "needed
somebody to dump it on."

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But even if she hadn't, I am interested in the raffle
for its own sake.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To entrust one's fate to chance and receive a
commensurate prize in return...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is almost like a test of one's true worth... I could
hardly call myself Emperor if I did not win
something suitably extravagant.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Which is to say, I will be satisfied with nothing
less than the grand-prize: the hot spring trip.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: How about it? Shall we prove our worth?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We glance at one another, nod, and then turn the
handle together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: We have bested luck today, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I'm rather pleased.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hah, do I not look it? I promise you, I am more
enthusiastic than you might think.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But this now leaves me with a quandary.
choice_data_list: Are you not a fan of hot springs?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Au contraire. I love nothing more than relaxing in
the hot water as I soak in the beauty of nature.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However... I do not believe I am yet worthy of
such luxuries.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So here. The ticket is yours.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed I am. Save it until I have earned the
holiday.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As for when that is, I leave it to your discretion. I
know that you will judge me fair and true.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha... There's no need to feel too concerned.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will work all the harder in anticipation of our
excursion together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And when that day comes, I will celebrate as
much as anybody else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ticket feels heavy in my hand, but with that
responsibility comes the promise of a fun
vacation.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The name seems apt. This patty is certainly
weighty.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's been a long time since I have seen a meal so
lavish.
choice_data_list: You don't normally eat this kind of thing?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not often, no.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I usually opt for plain cuts of steak when I feel
like meat, due to its low fat content.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You are what you eat, as they say. Although I
doubt you of all people need reminding of that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, this is a worthy prize. It would be a waste
not to make the most of it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It would go perfect with some melted cheese, a
parsley garnish, and... Oh! How about one of
those miniature flags?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But of course. When receiving a gift so fine, it is
one's duty to enjoy it to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend a good long while discussing how best
to decorate the patty.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, splendid. These will prove to be useful.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The student council was just planning an event to
raise the students' spirits.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With this many carrots, I daresay we can offer a
special meal for that day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll contact the cafeteria and see what they can do
on short notice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you could help? I know—why don't you
be my royal taster?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll warn you, this is an important duty. I trust
you'll not shirk it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I earned a prestigious position in
the Emperor's court.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Answer me this, Trainer. What is the most notable
nutritional aspect of a carrot?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. The body converts carotene to vitamin
A, which maintains the health of skin and bodily
membranes. It also has other benefits.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So how would you prepare a carrot to best aid
carotene absorption?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would like to know what dish would make
optimal use of this carrot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, we end up embroiled in a
fierce debate over how to bring out the best
qualities of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Tissues...
choice_data_list: Shame we missed out on the big prizes.
Shame we missed out on the big prizes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no need to feel down. Testing one's
luck would be no fun without the risk of failure.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I happen to be running low on tissues.
This has saved me the trouble of having to buy
more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to form, the Emperor takes the
disappointment in stride without a word of
complaint.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
By the way, do you have any other engagements
today?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have some time before my next appointment.
Seeing as we're nearby, I thought we might—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt, bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me, but it seems I'm out of time. I must
return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be my imagination, but Symboli Rudolf
looks a little dejected as she walks away.
